reviews.comment:
Una porquería siempre igual no se modernizan es la única ypf en la zona y parece abandonada dos surtidores, empleados mala onda, poca nafta, todo para atras

(Translated by Google)
It's always the same old rubbish, they never modernize. It's the only YPF in the area and it seems abandoned: two pumps, unfriendly employees, very little fuel, everything's going backwards
